system.description:
When you prepare for what's coming or seek the favor of the gods, say how and answer the GM's questions. Then, hold Preperation based on the amount of time you devote:

  • A week or so: 1 Preperation
  • A month or so: 2 Preperation
  • The better part of a season: 3 Preperation
When you make any roll to which your efforts might apply, you may spend 1 Preperation to add +1 to that roll, after it is made (maximum +1 per roll).
